publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-01-31 18:13:45 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, printed material, bills, statistics, accounts, alphabetical and subject files, photographs, and other material.
did.abstract: Includes correspondence, printed material on equipment, bills and expenses, grape statistics, accounts with grape growers, alphabetical and subject files, photographs, and other material of the Widmer Wine Cellars, Naples, New York. Includes correspondence with numerous American producers of grapes and wine.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, printed material on equipment, bills and expenses, grape statistics, accounts with grape growers, alphabetical and subject files, photographs, and other material of the Widmer Wine Cellars, Naples, New York. Includes correspondence with numerous American producers of grapes and wine.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Widmer Wine Cellars Records, #3141. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: City of New York Correspondence - Julius Wile Memo, 1940-1950
Memos and Newspaper Articles re Cooperative Contracts
Baron, John Melville - re New York State Wines
Lawton Mackall - re. Varietal and Other Widmer Wines
Wine Articles - New World Telegram and Sun
The Squibb Institute, Harold Applegate - re. Widner Varietals
Prisoner of War Camp - Bush Prefabricated Structure
Prisoner of War Second Service Command
St. James Wine & Liquor [St. James Wines, Inc.)
Industrial Filter and Pump Manucacturing Company
Morris Machine Works - Lester E. Mosher
New York State Department of Taxation
re Flash Pasteurizer purchased from Corning Glass
J. L. Buchman - Hebrew National Grape, et al
United States Federal Alcohol Administration - Alcohol Tax Unit
United States - Protests to Federal Alcohol Administration
Monopoly States and Others - Puerto Rico
Costa Rica - Export - Dominican Republic, Panama, Jamaica, Venezuela
Widmer Vineyards - Cash profit and loss
Certificate of Registration - Licenses and Permits
Widmer's Grape Product Industry and Wine Cellars, Inc.
Widmer's - Letters from Employees in Service
New York State Department of Agriculture
U.S. Internal Revenue - Alcohol Tax Unit
U.S. - Federal Trade Commissions and U.S. Congress
Concord Grape Co-op Development Assn. - Penn Yan - Annual Report
Concord Grape Co-op Assn. - Dunkirk Report
Progress Report from the Pilot Plant - Concord Grape Co-op Development Assn. - Penn Yan
Concord Grape Co-op Cevelopment Assn - Penn Yan - Annual Report
Sol Simon Contracts with Monarch Wine Corp.
New York State Agricultural Experiment Station
New York State Department of Labor
Ethnic Germans - Cancelled - Rejected - Closed Cases
New York State, Medical Society of
New Y ork State Agricutural Experiment Station
New York State Department of Taxation
New York State Department of Labor
Old Permits and Original of Blue Print
NY H2 Permits and Labels (sauces, jellies, etc.)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes recipe cards, Widmer Group Insurance booklet, an act about liquor traffic.

did.unittitle: Photographs of a presentation to the New York State Agricultural Experiment Station by Widmer executives. Includes a photo of Dr. John Einset.
Oversize Photographs including Panorama from Sherman Hill, Naples, New York, 1936
